# Osama Tahir — Digital Marketing Specialist & Full-Stack Developer, Dubai UAE

> Osama Tahir is a freelance full-stack web developer and digital marketing specialist based in Dubai, UAE. He helps small businesses and startups across the UAE grow online through custom websites, SEO, Google Ads, mobile apps, and performance marketing.

## Services

- [Web Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/web-development-dubai): Custom website design and development for businesses in Dubai and the UAE.
- [SEO Services Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/seo-services-dubai): Local and technical SEO to rank on Google in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and across the UAE.
- [Google Ads Management Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/google-ads-management-dubai): PPC campaign setup, management, and optimisation for UAE businesses.
- [Mobile App Development UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/mobile-app-development-uae): iOS and Android app development for startups and businesses in the UAE.
- [Shopify Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/shopify-development-dubai): Shopify store setup, customisation, and e-commerce solutions.
- [WordPress Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/wordpress-development-dubai): WordPress website design, development, and maintenance.
- [Social Media Marketing UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/social-media-marketing-uae): Social media strategy, content, and paid campaigns across platforms.
- [Landing Page Design Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/landing-page-design-dubai): High-converting landing pages for lead generation and paid traffic.
